title: gouldia terminalis f. eustipulacea
intro: Gouldia terminalis f. eustipulacea is a variant of the Gouldia terminalis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. However, I couldn't find any specific information on the medicinal properties, health benefits, and herbal preparations of Gouldia terminalis f. eustipulacea. It is essential to note that Gouldia terminalis is native to the Hawaiian Islands and is considered an endangered species. I recommend consulting a reliable source or an expert for more information on this plant variant.
